title: BLB Mod
description: Welcome to BLB Mod, this mod is a mod that was made for the only purpose being a mod for BLB (BLB is a group of friends who use to have too much time to kill and now are making a video game project)
body:
The BLB Mod is a mod that was made by and for BLB as a mod published as of now, BLB is a group of friend that use to have a lot of time to kill, being the reason this mod exists but also that BLB is a video game project that is currently being worked on, the mod itself is not trying to reproduce the game as it would be kinda underwhelming and not representative of what we are currently developping in the backstage. Although, as of writting, this mod's only purpose is to be a goofy little mod that adds a few new materials, a new dimension, biomes, and others to minecraft, including entities and whatnot.

But you may wonder :  

What does it actually add?  
The BLB mod is based off of a few things from the BLB video game project which is far from being even a quarter into developpement, although a few things are concepts that might either make it into the game, or not (note that not everything that will be in the game will be in this mod and vice versa), the content added to the game with this mod on the other hand is classical minecraft mod stuff :  

-ores (Xium, Plaustrite, Uranum, Zithium)  
-dimension (Galaxia which is normally a planet but eh this is made with no budget so)  
-a new special table (frosting table which is still in the works)  
-new armor sets (Titanium-X and Reinforced Diamond)  
-new biomes (Super Cliffs in both overworld and Galaxia, Galaxian Plains, Galaxian Volcanos, and Enchanted forest which are all 3 exclusive to Galaxia)  
-new creatures (featuring Boom as a somewhat boss, Kyouma, and Galaxians of all 3 colors Red Blue Green which all have different mechanics to themselves)  
-new trees (Chabba and Lucrius, which are Blue and Green respectively)  
-new weapons/tools (Titanium-X Hammer as both a Pickaxe and a Sword, Rocket Launcher which fires rockets)  
-new structures (mud houses, mud towers, and lost huts all in super cliffs)  
-a new potion (warning : the effect does nothing, it's the potion that when sent on another player/entity gives it a coktail of bad effects)  

Why should i get this mod?  
It's fun.  
More seriously, it just adds a little more to it than just being a mod with barely any content, it has a whole aspect of being more than that, adding more content then most other mods (smaller mods in general).  
This mod adds a whole new amount of incredible things to do and test out, new tools, new entities, and others, to add more diversity in minecraft in it's own compact dimension and more.  

Do i need to know something important about it before playing it?  
This mod was produced almost entirely using Mcreator, Piskel App, and others in order to create it's content.  
The mod is currently in a phase of Alpha, updates and others will be rare but major most of the times, the mod will also only be available for 1.20.1+.
